label: Camera groups
description: Configuration for named camera groups used to organize cameras in the UI.

cameras.label: List of cameras in this group
cameras.description: Array of camera names included in this group.

icon.label: Icon that represents camera group
icon.description: Icon used to represent the camera group in the UI.

order.label: Sort order for group
order.description: Numeric order used to sort camera groups in the UI; larger numbers appear later.
